balanced.label: Balanced
balanced.description: Default engine posture: moderate hold, mid-block press, mild attack line push. Reference style for custom tuning.

tiki_taka.label: Tiki-Taka
tiki_taka.description: Short passing and free movement. Low formation hold, high support intensity, freer lanes and earlier own-half support without an extreme high line.

catenaccio.label: Catenaccio
catenaccio.description: Deep, organized block. High formation hold, minimal support push, conservative attack line so the unit stays compact and hard to break down.

gegenpressing.label: Gegenpressing
gegenpressing.description: High press with a compact mid-high block. Wins the ball early and supports quickly; line is raised but not abandoned so counters hurt less.

structured_counter.label: Structured Counter
structured_counter.description: Rigid defensive spacing with vertical transition. Holds shape without the ball; when attacking, push scale and role bias spring runners forward.

wing_play.label: Wing Play
wing_play.description: Stretch the pitch. Wide support lanes, strong lateral stretch, advanced wide regions for crosses and cutbacks.

route_one.label: Route One
route_one.description: Direct vertical football. High pass aggression and free form pull so strikers run early; line raised but back four not abandoned.
